title: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
company: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
